name: Judy Gold
blurb: She won two Daytime Emmy Awards as a writer and producer on The Rosie ODonnell Show.
bio: Judy Gold is an American stand-up comedian, actress, writer, and producer who has been a fixture at the Comedy Cellar since the 1980s and is known for material about motherhood, family, and being a Jewish lesbian. She won two Daytime Emmy Awards as a writer and producer on The Rosie ODonnell Show.

timeline.ev: Does her first stand-up set at Rutgers University
Premieres the solo show 25 Questions for a Jewish Mother
Opens Off-Broadway with The Judy Show: My Life as a Sitcom
Publishes the essay collection Yes I Can Say That

accolades: Two Daytime Emmy Awards for The Rosie ODonnell Show
Stand-up specials on HBO, Comedy Central, and LOGO
GLAAD Media Award for 25 Questions for a Jewish Mother

bits.t: How To Tell When A Woman Isnt Listening
